summary: Completed frontend testing of OLL Reports page Team Member filter and GP CRM visibility. All features verified working correctly.

features_verified.feature: Reports page - Team member filter dropdown shows list of team members
features_verified.verification: Dropdown has 11 options (1 'All Team Members' + 10 team members). Team members include: TEST_GP_ACTIVATE_025434, TEST_Full_Workflow_ee688de6, Shrey test, Test User, Shrey Bro, John Doe, etc.

features_verified.feature: Reports page - Selecting a team member filters the data
features_verified.verification: Data changes when team member is selected. 'All Team Members' shows: Students: 6, Schools: 8, Educators: 2, Revenue: ₹10,000. Selecting 'TEST_GP_ACTIVATE_025434' shows: Students: 0, Schools: 0, Educators: 0, Revenue: ₹0. Filter is working correctly.

features_verified.feature: GP applications from website visible in Admin GP CRM
features_verified.verification: GP CRM shows 12 New Leads. Website-sourced GPs visible including: 'Website Test GP' (growth_partner_page), 'TEST_GP_2c5416' (Website), 'TEST_GP_72dc80' (Website), 'TEST_GP_025433' (Website), 'TEST_Growth_Partner' (centers_page).

features_verified.feature: Server.py has table of contents comment at top for navigation
features_verified.verification: Table of contents present at lines 52-82 in server.py. Lists all major sections with line numbers: WHATSAPP TEMPLATES (52-235), PYDANTIC MODELS (235-546), AUTH ENDPOINTS (1738-1820), ADMIN REPORTS ENDPOINTS (8287-9200), etc.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team member filter in Reports page is fully functional. Dropdown fetches from /api/team-users endpoint and passes assigned_to parameter to all report endpoints when a team member is selected. GP CRM shows all growth partner applications including those from website forms.
